description: A candid press/documentary photograph (no graphic design, text, or seal overlay) of President Trump speaking to reporters at an outdoor construction site, apparently a building project on a government campus (a classical stone building, a tall construction crane, exposed foundation/rebar, blue tarps and safety barriers are visible behind him under a clear blue sky). Trump stands center-frame in a dark suit, white shirt and red tie with arms spread mid-gesture; an aide in a suit with a lanyard stands to the right, and in the foreground are boom microphones and a press photographer/cameraman with a large camera. It carries no on-image text (the caption 'The president who does it all.' appears only in the tweet).
